// EasyServerSettings: Edit typed values first; they override ACE keys with the same name. Section dictionaries apply earlier and hold Sql/ace-shard-settings.sql extras only.
// Quick Start: EnableMod + ApplyShardPreset must be true for PropertyManager apply. VerboseLogging surfaces unknown ACE keys.
// EnableMod: Master switch — false disables the mod entirely.
// ApplyShardPreset: On startup/world open, push settings into ACE PropertyManager.
// ResyncVariablesAfterApply: After apply, persist PropertyManager state to the shard database.
// VerboseLogging: Log when ACE rejects a property key (version mismatch).
// LogSummary: Log counts of bool/long/double applies after each run.
// MaxDiffLinesSentToPlayer: Caps lines for the /essdiff admin helper.
// RareDropRate: ACE rare_drop_rate_percent — base chance for rare tier rolls.
// VitaePenalty: ACE vitae_penalty — fraction of vitae lost per death (0.01 = 1%).
// VitaePenaltyMax: ACE vitae_penalty_max — cap on accumulated vitae penalty.
// PkTimer: ACE pk_timer — seconds between PK kills counting toward streak/timer.
// CharDeleteTime: ACE char_delete_time — seconds before a deleted slot can be reused (not days).
// Fastbuff: ACE fastbuff — retail fast-buff animation bypass.
// UniversalMasteries: ACE universal_masteries — all skills may be specialized.
// ShowDotMessages: ACE show_dot_messages — DoT tick messages in chat.
// ShowAuraBuff: ACE show_aura_buff — aura buff UI cues.
// ShowAmmoBuff: ACE show_ammo_buff — ammo buff UI cues.
// ---------- Extra long properties (ACE: Not covered by typed fields above. Applied before typed longs; typed wins on duplicate keys.
// ShardLongsExtra: chat_requires_* gate global chat by account age/level/time. corpse_spam_limit throttles corpse spam. default_subscription_level sets default account tier. mansion_min_rank gates mansion purchase. rares_max_* throttle rare drops. summoning_killtask_multicredit_cap caps bonus KT credits. teleport_visibility_fix tweaks teleport visibility handling (0 = default). Applied before typed longs; typed wins on duplicate keys.
// ---------- Extra double properties (A: Advanced tuning not exposed as typed fields. Applied before typed doubles; typed wins on duplicate keys.
// ShardDoublesExtra: luminance_modifier scales luminance gain. ignore_magic_*_pvp_scalar tune void/PVP magic mitigation. pk_new_character_grace_period / pk_respite_timer are PK safety windows (seconds). quest_mindelta_rate scales quest repeat timers. unlocker_window and vendor_unique_rot_time control vendor uniqueness rotation. chess_ai_start_time sets chess AI (-1 default). advocate_fane_auto_bestow_level pairs with advocate_fane_auto_bestow bool in gameplay dict.
// FellowshipEvenShareLevel: ACE fellowship_even_share_level — min level for fellowship even-share XP.
// FellowshipQuestBonus: ACE fellow_quest_bonus — fellowship quest XP bonus formula.
// FellowshipKillTaskLandblock: ACE fellow_kt_landblock — share kill tasks within landblock/dungeon range.
// House30DayCooldown: ACE house_30day_cooldown — enforce 30-day wait between house purchases.
// HouseRentEnabled: ACE house_rent_enabled — require periodic rent payments.
// WorldClosed: ACE world_closed — show shard-closed messaging to clients.
// QuestInfoEnabled: ACE quest_info_enabled — quest info slash commands.
// RaresRealTime: ACE rares_real_time — real-time rare generation cadence.
// AccountLoginBootsInUse: ACE account_login_boots_in_use — boot older session when same account logs in.
// AllowNegativeDispelResist: ACE allow_negative_dispel_resist — negative dispels can be resisted.
// AllowNegativeRatingCurve: ACE allow_negative_rating_curve — legacy void DoT rating curve past negative DR.
// AllowPklBump: ACE allow_pkl_bump — PK Lite /pkl collision bump (retail door skip).
// MeleeMaxAngle: ACE melee_max_angle — max off-angle melee (0 = retail).
// SpellcastMaxAngle: ACE spellcast_max_angle — max off-angle spell targeting.
// FastMissileModifier: ACE fast_missile_modifier — damage modifier for fast missile path.
// MobAwarenessRange: ACE mob_awareness_range — multiplier on NPC awareness distance.
// PlayerSaveInterval: ACE player_save_interval — automatic player save period (seconds).
// VoidPvpModifier: ACE void_pvp_modifier — scales void damage in PVP.
// ShardBooleansChat: Global chat: channel disables, echo/reject behavior, per-channel server logging, and chat gates. Applied before top-level keys; top-level overrides the same ACE key.
// ShardBooleansGameplay: Retail movement/consumption quirks, combat pets, fellow recruitment/KT rules, gateway ties, advocate fane, house hook/account limits, and dispel/item combat toggles.
// ShardBooleansWorldLoot: Creatures, corpses, equipment set IDs, lootgen legacy mode, encounters, olthoi play, pyreals on death, spell components, salvage, and related world rules.
// ShardBooleansClientUi: Client/UI messaging, chess/report UI, spell FX, vendor generator, taboo filter, and similar presentation toggles.
